user_query: I'm a writer and I need to extract text from images for my book. Can you help me extract the text from the images and fetch the metadata as well? Additionally, I would like to retrieve the user details of my friends who recently downloaded movies from the YTS.am Torrent API.

TaskList.description: Extract text from the provided images.
Fetch metadata for the extracted text.
Retrieve user details of friends who downloaded movies from the YTS.am Torrent API.
